scope: install.mjs; install.sh; install.ps1; uninstall.mjs; PACKAGE-MANIFEST.json; VERSION

facts.summary: install.mjs is the cross-platform Node.js ESM installer; it reads VERSION at runtime to stamp kitVersion.
install.mjs supports a default global mode and a --project-local <repository> self-contained mode.
Global install copies agents/, skills/, commands/ and the docgen engine from global-template into commandCodeHome (~/.commandcode), using sha256 change detection and optional --force backup.

mergeGlobalSettings injects: SessionStart->docgen-session-context.mjs; PreToolUse write|edit->docgen-guard-write-paths.mjs; PreToolUse shell->docgen-guard-shell.mjs; PostToolUse write|edit->docgen-validate-written-artifact.mjs.
Installer writes installation.json (scope, installed files) under commandCodeHome/docgen and optionally runs 'npm link' unless --no-link-cli.

uninstall.mjs removes only files recorded in installation.json (skipping settings.json and docgen/), strips engine-pointing hook entries from settings.json, deletes ~/.commandcode/docgen, optionally npm unlinks, and never deletes repository .docgen/ or docs/.
install.sh (bash 'exec node') and install.ps1 (maps PowerShell switches to install.mjs args) are thin delegators to install.mjs.
